item.name: Brave New Y'shtola
item.description:
Not wont to run from her troubles─and couldn't get very far, anyway.

Use item to acquire the brave new Y'shtola minion.
item.tooltip:
Did you really think I would
go gently into that dark night
with so much left undone?
   - Y'shtola
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 90 to all enemies within range.
